hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat /dev/stdin | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *git\ commit*) cd /home/jmc/AnKLuMe && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=line --ignore=tests/e2e --ignore=tests/test_e2e_real.py -m "not real and not slow" 2>&1 | tail -3; test ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 || { echo "BLOCKED: les tests doivent passer avant le commit"; exit 2; } ;; esac'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat /dev/stdin | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */CLAUDE.md|*/SPEC.md|*/ARCHITECTURE.md|*/pyproject.toml) echo "BLOCKED: fichier critique — modification manuelle requise ou confirmation explicite"; exit 2;; esac'
